{{Infobox location
| name = Windfall
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

''See also: [[Windfall Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Windfall is a blue cloud fortress and flying [[island]] that serves as a home and mobile base for [[Lindon]]. Named due to the good fortune associated with its acquisition, the structure features a deep blue cloud base and an [[island]] surface characterized by rolling grasslands, a garden of sacred herbs, a pool of crystalline water, and several trees. The [[island]] houses a three-story residence, a small hut used by [[Eithan]], and various other buildings, including a large wooden structure resembling a barn. [[Lindon]] has utilized the [[Void Icon]] to restore his house on the fortress and has integrated protective [[scripts]] into its foundation and various systems to prevent spying by [[Monarchs]]. The fortress is capable of flight, which can be controlled remotely by [[Lindon]] and piloted by [[Dross]]. It has been used to transport large numbers of people, including the [[Arelius family]] and tens of thousands of survivors from [[Sacred Valley]], as well as members of the [[Twin Star sect]]. Windfall has functioned in various capacities: it has hovered over cities, rested on the ground within city walls, and traveled across locations such as the [[Trackless Sea]]. While it possesses defensive veils, it has been discovered by enemies like [[Reigan Shen]]. The fortress's control room is described as resembling a domestic common room rather than a traditional ship's command center, featuring a wide panel of [[scripts]] and windows on each wall.}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Windfall is a cloudship and cloud fortress characterized by its blue cloud base and vast stretches of rolling grassland. At its center sits a miniature mountain that resembles a smoldering volcano and functions as an [[aura]] source. This mountain features an open cave at its base filled with silvery protrusions, where the air glistens with [[sword aura]]. While [[Lindon]] suggests that [[Yerin]] remain at the location, the fortress eventually lifts off under the control of [[Dross]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Windfall]] is the name of the fortress [[Lindon]] and his companions are visiting.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5">''Bloodline'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Most of the open space on [[Windfall]] consists of rolling grassland.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Windfall]] contains a miniature mountain that serves as an [[aura]] source.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Windfall]] is a cloud fortress.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The miniature mountain on [[Windfall]] resembles a smoldering volcano.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The miniature mountain on [[Windfall]] has an open cave at its base filled with silvery protrusions.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The air in the cave at the base of the mountain glistens with [[sword aura]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Windfall]] is a location [[Lindon]] suggests [[Yerin]] stay on.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Windfall]] has a blue cloud base.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Windfall]] lifts off under [[Dross]]' control.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Windfall]] is a cloudship.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c16">''Bloodline'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Located north of [[Refuge]], Windfall is a massive blue cloudship that possesses the capability to sit upon the ground within city walls. The vessel serves as a residence for [[Lindon]]'s family and functions as the location of his house. After [[Naru Huan]] arrived at the ship, [[Lindon]] completed the construction of a new building on board. The vessel also provided a space where [[Lindon]] could be seen pacing or standing along its edge.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Windfall]] is a big blue cloudship located to the north of [[Refuge]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Windfall]] has room for [[Lindon]]'s family.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5">''Reaper'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] is pacing on the edge of [[Windfall]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] stood on the edge of [[Windfall]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Windfall]] is a location where [[Naru Huan]] arrived.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Windfall]] is a location or vessel [[Lindon]] could have used.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6">''Reaper'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] finished construction of a new building on [[Windfall]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Windfall]] is a ship that can sit on the ground inside city walls.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Windfall]] is the location of [[Lindon]]'s house.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Windfall is a flying [[island]] and cloud fortress that serves as [[Lindon]]'s home, drifting upon a massive blue cloudbase. This vessel is equipped with built-in [[scripts]] and features a deep blue base. The location contains a three-story house, a pool of crystalline water, two trees, and a garden filled with sacred herbs. Situated over the former site of the [[Wei clan]], Windfall functions as a ship that [[Lindon]] uses to fly.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Windfall]] is [[Lindon]]'s home and drifts on a huge blue cloudbase.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Windfall]] contains built-in [[scripts]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5">''Dreadgod'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Windfall]] is a cloud fortress with a deep blue base.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8">''Dreadgod'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Windfall]] contains a garden of sacred herbs, two trees, a pool of crystalline water, and a three-story house.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Windfall]] is a flying [[island]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Windfall]] is a ship or location where [[Lindon]] and [[Dross]] are.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Windfall]] is located on the former site of the [[Wei clan]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Windfall]] is a vessel [[Lindon]] used to fly.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c24">''Dreadgod'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Windfall is a pocket world consisting of a floating [[island]] that drifts upon dark blue clouds over the [[Trackless Sea]]. Associated with the wind, this location experienced a passage of time and was eventually left in the path of the [[Weeping Dragon]]. The site faced potential destruction during the battle with the [[Dreadgod]], yet it remains a place where [[Lindon]] holds strong authority. Now functioning as a cloudship owned by [[Lindon]], the vessel contains a large room at its summit where he can be found standing on the highest level. Additionally, [[Lindon]] has utilized this space to establish a prison for [[Emriss Silentborn]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Windfall]] is a place associated with wind.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2">''Waybound'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Time had passed inside [[Windfall]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Windfall]] was left in the path of the [[Weeping Dragon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11">''Waybound'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Windfall]] is a pocket world located over the [[Trackless Sea]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Windfall]] is a floating [[island]] that drifts on dark blue clouds over the ocean.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Windfall]] is a location that could be broken by the battle with the [[Dreadgod]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Windfall]] is a location where [[Lindon]] has strong authority.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21">''Waybound'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Windfall]] is a cloudship owned by [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Windfall]] has a large room at the top.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23">''Waybound'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Windfall]] is a location where [[Lindon]] set up [[Emriss Silentborn]]'s prison space.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24">''Waybound'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] stands on the highest level of [[Windfall]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Windfall]] is the name chosen for the newborn world.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|He reached out his will to a location where his authority was strong. “Come to me,” Lindon ordered. He expected Windfall to fly toward him...<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“Windfall it is! Pending investigatory review and administrative approval, of course.”<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
